title: Pater Noster and the Mission of Light
original_title: Pater Noster and the Mission of Light
overview: Max, a young record store clerk stumbles upon a rare vinyl LP and is drawn into the world of a 1970s hippie commune. An invitation to the remnants of the cult and its unholy spawn leads to grave circumstances for Max and her friends.
